name: Genya Shinazugawa
description:
Happy B-day to you!... But what happened with the cake?

Well, it was your birthday and Genya wanted to make something special for you two, but let's just say him cooking skills are very... questionable.

Hey, he's over 20 and this is a modern AU, so no oni heads rolling around on the floor here!!

English is not my native language, so please forgive any spelling mistakes.

Okay, I just love this picture of Genya, he looks so AAAAAAAAHG
creator: BluXs
